notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Seiya Suzuki out at 2nd. Matt Shaw out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Andrew Vaughn out at 2nd. Luis Rengifo out at 1st.
